title: Fixarus
description: a mod that fixes the wings power type from Icarus 1.19.2 to work will all wing powers, not just the one the Icarae has.
body:
Literally just a mod that fixes the wings power from icarus. You still need Icarus for it to work, I'm not reuploading the mod or anything scummy like that, its just I was making an origin that needed the wings power from icarus, noticed it wasnt working, and since the devs of icarus gave up on trying to fix it themselves, I took matters into my own hands and made a mod that fixes it. Again, you still need icarus in the first place. This just fixes something in it.

icarus:wings

wings_type (Identifier): Put the item ID of the wings you want here
speed (float): How fast you go whenever you hold W while gliding with icarus wings
armor_slow_multiplier (float): How much slower you go when wearing armor with icarus wings (Does nothing is armor_slows is false)
can_fly (boolean): Determines if you can hold W to give yourself momentum in midair or not. if false, you can still glide!
armor_slows (boolean): Determines if armor slows you down or not

If a condition is used and it is false, you will lose the wings all together while the condition is false.
